select.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT c_clubno, closestate, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ c_clubname, username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ username, c_sysopid, applicationdate FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE $v_S_RADIO$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%') AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY applicationdate DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT c_clubno, closestate, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ c_clubname, username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ username, c_sysopid, applicationdate FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE $v_S_RADIO$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%') AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY $v_SORT1$ $v_SORT2$

select.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT c_clubno, closestate, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ c_clubname, username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ username, c_sysopid, applicationdate FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY applicationdate DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT DISTINCT c_clubno, closestate, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ c_clubname, username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ username, c_sysopid, applicationdate FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY $v_SORT1$ $v_SORT2$

sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE WHERE $v_S_RADIO$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%') AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT c_clubno, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ c_clubname, username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ username, c_sysopid, c_regdate FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE $v_S_RADIO$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%') AND A.c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.c_regdate DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT c_clubno, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ c_clubname, username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ username, c_sysopid, c_regdate FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE $v_S_RADIO$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%') AND A.c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY $v_SORT1$ $v_SORT2$

select.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT c_clubno, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ c_clubname, username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ username, c_sysopid, c_regdate FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = B.userid AND A.c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY A.c_regdate DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT c_clubno, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ c_clubname, username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ username, c_sysopid, c_regdate FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY $v_SORT1$ $v_SORT2$

sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE $v_S_RADIO$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_KEYWORD#, '%') AND c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE c_adminconfirm = 'N' AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT c_clubno, c_clubname, c_sysopid, c_clubdesc, c_regdate FROM (SELECT c_clubno, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ c_clubname, c_sysopid, c_clubdesc, c_regdate FROM TBL_C_CLUB
WHERE c_clubno IN (SELECT c_clubno FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE c_clubdesc LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_STRQUERY#, '%') AND tenant_id = #tenantID#) AND c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
WHERE c_clubno IN (SELECT c_clubno FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_STRQUERY#, '%') AND tenant_id = #tenantID#) AND c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
WHERE c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
ORDER BY c_regdate ASC LIMIT #v_IQUERYCOUNT#) A ORDER BY c_regdate DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(c_clubno), 0) FROM TBL_C_CLUB
WHERE c_clubno IN (SELECT c_clubno FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE c_clubdesc LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_STRQUERY#, '%') AND tenant_id = #tenantID#) AND c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
WHERE c_clubno IN (SELECT c_clubno FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_STRQUERY#, '%') AND tenant_id = #tenantID#) AND c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
WHERE c_adminconfirm = 'Y' AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT c_sysopid, c_clubgubun, isin, c_clubdesc, c_clubconfirmtype, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ AS c_clubname, c_cate_a, c_cate_b, c_cate_c FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_CLUB SET c_cate_a = #v_C_CATE_A#, c_cate_b = #v_C_CATE_B#, c_cate_c = #v_C_CATE_C#, c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ = #v_C_CLUBNAME#, isin = 2 WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT closereason FROM TBL_C_COMCLOSE WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_clubdesc FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_COMCLOSE SET closestate = #v_PCLOSESTATE# WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_C_CLUB SET c_adminconfirm = 'C' WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT B.email EMAIL, B.username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ USERNAME, A.c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.companyid = B.companyid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_C_CLUB SET c_adminconfirm = 'Y' WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO USER (userid, usernm, passwd, empno, emptype, deptid, positionid, jobtitleid, status, email, mobiletel, officetel, fax, hometel, userintro, joindate, retiredate, totalmileage, recentmileage, seq, regdate, photopath, conlevel, subdeptid, roleinfo, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_CODE#, #v_COMNAME#, '', '', 'W', 'TOP', 1, 1, 'W', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, #v_pNow#, #v_pNow#, 0, 0, NULL, #v_pNow#, NULL, '', NULL, 'C', #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO ROLE (userid, roletype, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_CODE#, 'C', #tenantID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT B.email EMAIL, B.username$v_USERINFO_LANG$ USERNAME, A.c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME FROM TBL_C_CLUB A INNER JOIN TBL_C_MEMBERINFO B ON RTRIM(A.c_sysopid) = RTRIM(B.userid) AND A.companyid = B.companyid AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE RTRIM(A.c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT username FROM TBL_C_MEMBERINFO WHERE RTRIM(userid) = #v_ID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT c_clubname$v_USERINFO_LANG$ C_CLUBNAME FROM TBL_C_CLUB WHERE RTRIM(c_clubno) = #v_CODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
